LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_Desc: Carry a living prisoner or downed hostile to a colony heart. Fingerspikes implant themselves into the target; one is required for every 300 market value. Unrecruitable targets are remade as toughspikes.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_Success: {0} has been accepted by the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_Toughspike: {0} could not be recruited and was remade as a toughspike.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_HumanlikeOnly: Only living humanlike pawns can be accepted by force.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NotColonists: Player colonists cannot be targeted by forced flesh acceptance.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_TargetStatus: Target must be a prisoner or a downed hostile pawn.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_AlreadyAccepted: This pawn is already bound to the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_AlreadyInProgre: This pawn is already being accepted by the flesh colony.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoHeart: No valid colony heart is available.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoAnchor: There is no clear place near a colony heart for the target.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NoCarrier: No capable colonist can carry this target to a colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_NotEnoughFinger: Flesh acceptance needs {0} fingerspikes, but only {1} can reach the colony heart.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_CannotStart: Flesh acceptance could not be started.
LanguageData.FB_ForcedFleshConversion_MissingJobDef: Forced flesh acceptance is missing job definitions.
